content:
Coordinate worker delegation for this round.
Target agents: POOL-0..POOL-4.
Available shapes: 195 shapes available (195 unprocessed).
Batch target: 10 shapes.

OPTIMIZED SHAPE DISTRIBUTION (batch-size=2, 5 workers, 10 total shapes):
POOL-0: shapes [0..2) - LA26428-5Shape, Shape
POOL-1: shapes [2..4) - WomanShape, RespiratoryTherapistShape
POOL-2: shapes [4..6) - ComorbidityShape, NeurologistShape
POOL-3: shapes [6..8) - CardiologistShape, TownShape
POOL-4: shapes [8..10) - RadiologicTechnologistShape, EncounterShape

Delegate immediately using these assignments.

First pass: delegate the next batch and keep instructions concise.

Use SHACL context as source of truth for constraints.

Delegate immediately:
- Call `delegate_tasks` for each worker that should run this round.
- Keep each assignment short and concrete.
- Include target shape(s), target class, and whether to CREATE new instances or FIX existing ones.
- Include unresolved focus node/property details when available from Validation Report.
- Require worker tool call: worker_progress(status, target_shape, target_class, changed_triples_count, validation_result, remaining_issues).

Rules:
- Do not produce long analysis text; prioritize immediate tool calls.
- Skip workers with no actionable assignment.
- Always instruct workers to create instances when assigned target class has no instances.
- Keep workers scoped to assigned shapes/classes only.

ToolRequest[toolCallId=tooluse_Mz2I2jc35dS8gn2qIa4oYn, name=delegate_tasks, arguments={instructions=CREATE instances for the following target classes. No existing instances — create new ones.

1. Shape: `http://purl.bioontology.org/ontology/LNC/LA26428-5Shape`
   Target class: `http://purl.bioontology.org/ontology/LNC/LA26428-5`
   → Create at least 1 instance of this class.

2. Shape: `http://purl.bioontology.org/ontology/SNOMEDCT/394733009Shape`
   Target class: `http://purl.bioontology.org/ontology/SNOMEDCT/394733009`
   → Create at least 1 instance of this class.

Use prefix: `@prefix opencare: <https://w3id.org/opencare#> .`
Use the ontology to determine appropriate properties for each instance.
Commit results to the triple store.

Respond with: worker_progress(status, target_shape, target_class, changed_triples_count, validation_result, remaining_issues), target_agent=POOL-0}]
